description: Inputs passed to the Balancer policy WASM at evaluation time

poolId.description: Balancer pool identifier (the bytes32 pool id, 0x-prefixed).

chain.description: Balancer GraphQL GqlChain enum value naming the network the pool lives on (e.g. 'MAINNET', 'ARBITRUM', 'BASE').

allowed_token_addresses.description: Optional whitelist of token contract addresses (0x...). When non-empty, the Rego rule denies pools containing any token outside this set. Empty array disables the whitelist.
